negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: common_sense_718bca4c-3946-4f5b-8f82-3dbf4fba2252
prompt: In this medium shot captured at a slightly low angle, the camera gently shakes with random slight tremors, creating a dynamic and immersive feel. The central figure is a man in a dark green and black tracksuit, standing confidently with short hair, a beard, and a mustache. He holds a microphone in his right hand, engaging in conversation with two women on either side of him. To his left, a woman is being interviewed; she wears a black puffy jacket over a light pink sports jersey, with her hair neatly combed back and tied in a ponytail that drapes over her left shoulder. A beige paper bag hangs from her right wrist. On his right stands another woman, dressed in a black jacket over a gray hoodie with a red logo, her hair styled in corn rows at the front and an afro puff on the back of her head.   The man looks to his right at the woman talking, while the woman on the right runs her left palm over the back of her head. He then pulls the microphone closer to himself and speaks, causing the woman on the right to quickly bend forward, smiling, before straightening up and crossing her arms, looking to her left. The man continues to hold the microphone towards the other woman, and the camera pans slightly left to focus on her. She turns her head to her left, and the man speaks again. She takes a quick look over her left shoulder.  The background reveals a bustling urban setting. To the left, a large set of stairs is crowded with people, while the escalators next to them are not functioning. The middle of the frame showcases a gray sky peeking through the upper left corner. On the right side, columns and the bottom corner of an electronic screen are visible. The scene is bathed in the soft, diffused light of an overcast day, adding a natural and candid quality to the moment.
